requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — DNTMS, FCCC, and Fiji Project Review
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——DNTMS、FCCC及斐济项目审查
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——DNTMS、FCCC及斐濟項目審查

summary.en: Fiji standards administration is handled through DNTMS, while the Fijian Competition and Consumer Commission (FCCC) is relevant to consumer and market conduct oversight. For grid-connected solar PV inverters, the practical safety baseline expected by utilities, EPCs, lenders, and project owners is IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the inverter model or model family. Fiji's tropical maritime environment also makes the safety file more than an electrical shock file: it should document IP rating, humidity and temperature operating limits, corrosion controls, terminal and enclosure materials, surge protection coordination, and installation constraints for cyclone-prone and salt-mist coastal locations.
summary.zh: 斐济标准管理由DNTMS负责，Fijian Competition and Consumer Commission（FCCC）则与消费者和市场行为监管相关。对于并网太阳能光伏逆变器，公用事业、电力工程承包商、融资方和项目业主通常期待的实际安全基准是覆盖逆变器型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据。斐济热带海洋环境也意味着安全文件不应只覆盖电击风险：还应记录IP等级、湿度和温度运行限值、防腐蚀控制、端子和外壳材料、浪涌保护配合，以及适用于气旋易发和沿海盐雾地点的安装限制。
summary.zht: 斐濟標準管理由DNTMS負責，Fijian Competition and Consumer Commission（FCCC）則與消費者和市場行為監管相關。對於併網太陽能光伏逆變器，公用事業、電力工程承包商、融資方和項目業主通常期待的實際安全基準是覆蓋逆變器型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據。斐濟熱帶海洋環境也意味著安全文件不應只覆蓋電擊風險：還應記錄IP等級、濕度和溫度運行限值、防腐蝕控制、端子和外殼材料、浪湧保護配合，以及適用於氣旋易發和沿海鹽霧地點的安裝限制。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Department of National Trade Measurement and Standards (DNTMS) standards administration
Fijian Competition and Consumer Commission (FCCC) consumer and market oversight context

summary.en: China-side PV inverter safety evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic voluntary CQC or CGC certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These files may demonstrate China-market conformity but are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates requested in Fiji project procurement or EFL grid-connection review. China documentation also often assumes domestic environmental and installation conditions, and may not cover Fiji-specific cyclone, high-humidity, salt-mist, and elevated ambient-temperature derating risks.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器安全证据通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内自愿性CQC或CGC认证及CNAS认可实验室报告。这些文件可以证明中国市场合规，但不会自动替代斐济项目采购或EFL并网审查中要求的IEC 62109-1/-2证书。中国文件也通常假设国内环境和安装条件，可能未覆盖斐济特有的气旋、高湿、盐雾和高环境温度降额风险。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器安全證據通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內自願性CQC或CGC認證及CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些文件可以證明中國市場合規，但不會自動替代斐濟項目採購或EFL併網審查中要求的IEC 62109-1/-2證書。中國文件也通常假設國內環境和安裝條件，可能未覆蓋斐濟特有的氣旋、高濕、鹽霧和高環境溫度降額風險。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary China-market PV inverter certification schemes

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety evidence should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the specific inverter model or family supplied to Fiji. Exporters should confirm whether the buyer, EFL, EPC, or lender requires ILAC-accredited reports, and should add environmental design evidence for coastal corrosion, humidity, enclosure sealing, surge withstand, ventilation, and cyclone-resistant installation. Where an inverter model is reconfigured from a China-market firmware profile to Fiji's 240/415 V, 50 Hz profile, the safety and operating-limit documentation should identify that configuration.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全证据应补充覆盖供应至斐济的具体逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告。出口商应确认买方、EFL、EPC或融资方是否要求ILAC认可报告，并增加沿海腐蚀、湿度、外壳密封、浪涌耐受、通风和抗气旋安装的环境设计证据。若逆变器型号从中国市场固件配置改为斐济240/415 V、50 Hz配置，安全和运行限值文件应识别该配置。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全證據應補充覆蓋供應至斐濟的具體逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告。出口商應確認買方、EFL、EPC或融資方是否要求ILAC認可報告，並增加沿海腐蝕、濕度、外殼密封、浪湧耐受、通風和抗氣旋安裝的環境設計證據。若逆變器型號從中國市場韌體配置改為斐濟240/415 V、50 Hz配置，安全和運行限值文件應識別該配置。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory in practice for utility, EPC, lender, insurer, or owner acceptance of Fiji grid-connected PV inverter projects
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary China-market PV inverter certification evidence does not automatically transfer to Fiji IEC 62109 project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, or domestic voluntary certification alone for Fiji PV inverter safety review. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for the supplied model and document Fiji-specific environmental controls for cyclone exposure, humidity, salt mist, surge protection, and thermal derating before shipment or project submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅依赖中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004或国内自愿性认证完成斐济光伏逆变器安全审查。出货或项目提交前，应为所供应型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2证据，并记录适用于斐济的气旋暴露、湿度、盐雾、浪涌保护和热降额环境控制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅依賴中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004或國內自願性認證完成斐濟光伏逆變器安全審查。出貨或項目提交前，應為所供應型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2證據，並記錄適用於斐濟的氣旋暴露、濕度、鹽霧、浪湧保護和熱降額環境控制。
